_comment: Declarative intake manifest for scripts/assets_pipeline.mjs. Each pack maps a directory of runtime GLBs to an optimization TREATMENT preset, a BUDGET class (config/asset-budgets.json), and a LICENSE record (emitted into public/assets/ATTRIBUTION.md's generated section). 'category' becomes the generated manifest filename (public/assets/manifest/<category>.manifest.json). keepClips (optional) prunes a rigged asset's animation set to just the named clips before compression — used where a CC0 pack ships dozens of clips the game never plays. See docs/ART_DIRECTION.md.

license.source: MPFB / MakeHuman-derived base bodies + Blender-authored modular pieces
license.author: project (CC0 base) + Quaternius/Kenney kit pieces
